LanguageData.VFEFactory_Conveyor.description: A simple conveyor belt capable of moving an item from one place to the other. Due to safety reasons, items on the conveyor belt cannot be interacted with.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_Conveyor.label: conveyor
LanguageData.VFEFactory_UndergroundConveyorEntrance.d: A simple entrance tunnel for the conveyor belt, allowing it to travel a short distance underground. Needs to be linked to a nearby underground conveyor exit to work.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_UndergroundConveyorExit.descr: A simple exit tunnel for the conveyor belt, allowing it to travel a short distance underground. Needs to be linked to a nearby underground conveyor entrance to work.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_UndergroundConveyorExit.label: underground conveyor exit
